name: DASHEL BARKER
title: THE OLD GUARD

abilities.name: Rush
abilities.text: While resolving the Charge action, increase the distance this model moves by up to +2".

abilities.name: Shouting Orders
abilities.text: Allies within 6" may declare the Prepare action as a (-) action.

abilities.name: Threatening Demeanor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

actions.name: Commander's Axe
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is within 2" of another ally, this attack receives a (+).

triggers.name: Sadistic Joy
triggers.text: An ally in LoS may declare a (melee) action targeting a different model.

actions.name: Enforce Compliance
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation.
actions.effects: Target gains an Injured token and declares an action chosen and controlled by this model.

triggers.name: Premonition
triggers.text: Look at the top card of your fate deck. This model may discard it.

actions.name: Call in Reinforcements
actions.effects: Summon a Guard model in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: From the Barracks
triggers.text: When resolving, summon the model anywhere in this model's deployment zone.

actions.name: "On Yer Feet!"
actions.effects: Target heals 2 and gains a Bolstered token.

triggers.name: Fast Tracked
triggers.text: Once per activation. Target gains a Promoted token.

merge_warnings: Title mismatch: front='THE OLD GUARD' back='The Old Guard'
